subject: math

target_skill.description: Additive composition toward a stated target within 10, demonstrated through deliberate tap-to-accumulate gameplay.

core_misconception.description: Player clicks as fast as possible and ignores the running total, assuming any click is progress regardless of the target.

success_metric: A first-time K-2 player reaches a correct commit on the running-total game within 60 seconds with no verbal hint from an adult.
notes: Mirrors the example-game request -> draft -> review chain already in the repo. primary_standard and target_skill.description match schemas/examples/concept_brief.example.json and schemas/examples/concept_packet.example.json so the three files tell a consistent operational story for the example slug.
